category_sources: source_facts.description: Pack and unpack conda environments created with pixi.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pixi-pack; official GitHub repository is github.com/quantco/pixi-pack.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to official pixi.sh documentation; official Quantco/pixi-pack README links Pixi documentation and provides usage docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/quantco/pixi-pack; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies pixi/conda environment packing; source_facts.executables lists pixi-pack and pixi-unpack.
